overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a fur-trimmed winter coat exploring a snowy valley with ancient stone ruins. The character walks through shallow streams and snow-covered terrain, passing beneath a large moss-covered archway into an open valley scattered with winter trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream in snowy valley approaching ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through shallow water toward the ancient stone archway ahead

entered.detail: large ruined brick archway with two tall pillars covered in moss and snow
snow-covered grassy bank lining the stream
dark rocky cliff face with patches of snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shallow stream in a snowy valley, approaching a large ancient stone archway in the distance. Snow-covered banks line the water, and rocky cliffs rise on the left side under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone archway passage with moss-covered ceiling

events.description: character steps out of the stream onto snow-covered ground at the base of the archway
character passes beneath the archway, camera tilting up to reveal moss-covered stonework above

agents.ego_description: walking through the ancient stone archway, glancing up at the moss-covered structure overhead

entered.detail: green moss and vegetation hanging from the stone arch ceiling
snow-covered trees visible through the archway in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto snow-covered ground and passes beneath the massive ancient stone archway. The camera tilts up to reveal moss and greenery clinging to the stonework overhead, while snow-covered trees become visible through the arch in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy valley stream with scattered winter trees

events.description: exits the archway into the open snowy valley with scattered winter trees

agents.ego_description: wading through the stream moving deeper into the snowy valley surrounded by winter trees

entered.detail: steep rocky valley walls with snow patches rising on the left side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the character continues through the stream into a wider snowy valley. Winter trees dot the landscape, and rocky valley walls rise on the left while the ancient archway recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered valley floor with winter trees

events.description: character exits the stream and continues walking on snow-covered ground

agents.ego_description: walking across the snow-covered valley floor, moving away from the stream toward the tree line

entered.detail: large snow-dusted boulders and rocky outcrops on the valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character steps out of the stream onto the snow-covered valley floor, continuing forward through the winter landscape. Rocky outcrops appear on the left, and the stream recedes behind as the character moves toward the distant tree line.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow snowy valley that gradually opens into a wide, frost-covered landscape. It begins with the character wading through a shallow stream flanked by snow-covered banks and towering rocky cliffs under an overcast sky. As the character steps onto the frozen ground, the camera tilts upward to reveal moss and greenery clinging to a massive ancient stone archway while passing beneath its shadow. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the arch and re-enters the stream, moving deeper into a wider valley dotted with winter trees. Finally, the character leaves the water behind to traverse the open snowy valley floor, moving past rocky outcrops toward a distant tree line.
